Author: dajoey
Name: Gluttony Combo
Punchline: Lalalazy fork of Wrath Combo — XIVCombo for very lazy players.
Description: Gluttony Combo is a lalalazy-branded fork of Wrath Combo. Condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button — and then some. All upstream credit to Team Wrath / PunishXIV.
